attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 WI_MT.OFFER_ATTR_ACV_RTNR_KEY       
,WI_MT.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  
,WI_MT.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD                     
,WI_MT.RTNR_UNIQUE_ID                
,WI_MT.SK_TRX_ID_INT                 
,WI_MT.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   
,WI_MT.SALES_MOTION_CD               
,WI_MT.ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY  
,WI_MT.ATTRIBUTION_PCT                    
,WI_MT.PRODUCT_KEY                   
,WI_MT.DV_PRODUCT_KEY                
,WI_MT.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY       
,WI_MT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
,WI_MT.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY    
,WI_MT.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY       
,WI_MT.TRANSACTION_BKG_VERSION_INT   
,WI_MT.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY            
,WI_MT.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY          
,WI_MT.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
,WI_MT.TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME         
,WI_MT.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY    
,WI_MT.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT             
,WI_MT.ENTERPRISE_SKU_PRDT_KEY       
,WI_MT.LNKD_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
,WI_MT.START_TV_DTM                  
,WI_MT.END_TV_DTM 
,WI_MT.EDW_CREATE_DTM                
,WI_MT.EDW_CREATE_USER               
,WI_MT.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                
,WI_MT.EDW_UPDATE_USER   
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_MT_OFFER_RTNR_ATTRIB_AR WI_MT
WHERE WI_MT.DML_TYPE='I' 
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_OFFER_RTNR_ATTRIBUTION MT
WHERE WI_MT.OFFER_ATTR_ACV_RTNR_KEY=MT.OFFER_ATTR_ACV_RTNR_KEY)

SELECT
 EL_INCR.OFFER_ATTR_ACV_RTNR_AR_KEY as OFFER_ATTR_ACV_RTNR_KEY       
,'AR' AS BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  
,EL_INCR.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             
,EL_INCR.RTNR_UNIQUE_ID                
,-999 AS SK_TRX_ID_INT                 
,EL_INCR.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   
,EL_INCR.SALES_MOTION_CD               
,-999 AS ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY 
,EL_INCR.ATTRIBUTION_PCT          
,EL_INCR.PRODUCT_KEY                   
,EL_INCR.DV_PRODUCT_KEY                
,EL_INCR.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY       
,CASE WHEN EL_INCR.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED') THEN -7777 ELSE EL_INCR.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  END AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY        
,EL_INCR.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY AS DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY    
,CASE WHEN EL_INCR.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED') THEN -999 ELSE EL_INCR.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY  END AS SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY     
,-999 AS TRANSACTION_BKG_VERSION_INT   
,EL_INCR.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY            
,EL_INCR.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY          
,EL_INCR.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
,EL_INCR.TRX_SOURCE_CD AS TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME         
,EL_INCR.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY    
,EL_INCR.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT              
,EL_INCR.DV_PRODUCT_KEY AS ENTERPRISE_SKU_PRDT_KEY /*RECHECK*/
,EL_INCR.LNKD_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,EL_INCR.START_TV_DTM                  
,EL_INCR.END_TV_DTM   
,EL_INCR.EDW_CREATE_DTM                
,CURRENT_USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER               
,EL_INCR.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                
,CURRENT_USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER  
,'I' AS ACTION_CODE
,CASE WHEN MT.OFFER_ATTR_ACV_RTNR_KEY IS NULL THEN 'I' ELSE 'U' END AS DML_TYPE
FROM 
$$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_OFFER_RTNR_ATTRIB EL_INCR
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_OFFER_RTNR_ATTRIBUTION MT 
ON EL_INCR.OFFER_ATTR_ACV_RTNR_AR_KEY=MT.OFFER_ATTR_ACV_RTNR_KEY
AND MT.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE='AR'
AND MT.END_TV_DTM=CAST('3500/01/01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))
WHERE EL_INCR.EDW_UPDATE_DTM>(SELECT CAST(LAST_EXTRACT_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) FROM $$ETLVWDB.DW_JOB_STREAMS WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_MT_OFFER_RTNR_ATTRIBUTION_AR')
